---
title: "brute_force.js"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/brute_force.js"
loc: 32
complexity: 5
logic_score: 7.35
style_score: 8.95
intel_score: 10.00
overall_score: 8.77
---

## Intent
A functional component of the Corvus Star static analysis matrix. It exists to support the broader ecosystem of system telemetry. Its role in the system is to provide foundational operational logic.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 7.3/10
- **Style [S]**: 9.0/10
- **Intel [I]**: 10.0/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 0 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [*](file://fs)

### Exports
- `forceFix`
- `content`
- `gravity`
- `search`
- `socket`
- `parser`
- `pathReg`
